creator: beastieboy@beastieboy.net
text:
Hi,

I've applied the changes requested.

Note that there is a new version of the software available today (0.6.0), but this one pulls openssl-src, which in turns builds a local, vendor version of OpenSSL, which we probably want to avoid. I will update the port later when I have sorted out this issue.

I haven't set the maintainer-approval yet, as I'm not sure what email address I should put as Requestee; should that be simply ports@freebsd.org?

Thank you for your help!
